body_txt: One thing that writers of Silly Love Songs don't like to mention is that love usually doesn't last forever. People break up all the time for reasons both good and lousy , and when someone writes a song about it, it's called a Break-Up Song. Although not as omnipresent as Silly Love Songs , if you turn on a radio station and listen for a while, there's a good chance that you'll hear a Break-Up Song or two mixed in with the endless stream of Silly Love Songs . Many times it emerges from the songwriter coming from a breakup himself. Breakups inspire all different kinds of emotions in people, so there's a lot of variety among Break-Up Songs. Songs written from the perspective of someone who has been dumped tend to be different from songs written from the perspective of the person doing the dumping. Please sort examples by the general category they fit into. Super-Trope to Celebrity Break-Up Song , when the artist writes about their own breakup with another celebrity. Certain types of breakup songs will veer into The Diss Track , or even "I Hate" Song , as well. Compare Anti-Love Song , Grief Song , Death Song , and Telephone Song . If the breakup was nasty enough, this can develop into a Revenge Ballad . Contrast Silly Love Songs .
